description: Interactive elements must be at least 44x44pt
check_instruction: Measure all buttons icons and tappable areas — flag anything below 44x44pt

description: Tappable elements must provide immediate visual feedback
check_instruction: Verify pressed states exist on all interactive elements; no silent taps

description: Minimum 8pt spacing between interactive elements
check_instruction: Check that adjacent tappable elements have at least 8pt separation

description: Content must respect 16pt horizontal safe-area margin on iPhone
check_instruction: Confirm leading and trailing content insets are 16pt minimum on iPhone

description: Use spacing scale values (4/8/12/16/20/24/32pt) — no arbitrary values
check_instruction: Audit layout constants for off-scale values like 5 7 11 15 or 22pt

description: All text must support Dynamic Type scaling
check_instruction: Enable largest accessibility text size and verify no truncation or overlap

description: Body text must meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio (WCAG AA)
check_instruction: Run contrast check on all text/background combinations

description: Display text should not exceed 34pt for body content
check_instruction: Check that body paragraph text stays within largeTitle size or smaller

description: Use Apple semantic system colors not hardcoded hex values
check_instruction: Search for hardcoded color values that should be semantic tokens

description: All UI colors must adapt correctly in dark mode
check_instruction: Toggle dark mode and inspect every screen for unreadable or missing colors

description: Do not use color as the only way to convey information
check_instruction: Check that status icons and badges also use text or iconography

description: Use spring or natural easing — avoid linear or ease-in-out tweens
check_instruction: Review animation curves in all transitions and confirm no linear timing

description: All animations must respect Reduce Motion accessibility setting
check_instruction: Enable Reduce Motion and confirm animations fade or disable gracefully

description: Use continuous (squircle) corner style not circular
check_instruction: Verify cornerCurve is continuous on all rounded rectangles

description: Corner radii must match the component type from the HIG scale
check_instruction: Audit radius values against: button 12 card 10/16/24 sheet 21

description: All interactive elements must have an accessibility label
check_instruction: Run VoiceOver and confirm every button and icon announces a meaningful label

description: Focus order must follow logical reading order top-to-bottom left-to-right
check_instruction: Navigate screen with VoiceOver and verify order matches visual layout

description: UI must be usable with color blindness filters
check_instruction: Enable Color Filters (Deuteranopia) and confirm all states are distinguishable

description: Minimum body font size is 15pt; avoid sub-12pt text
check_instruction: Search codebase for fontSize values below 12 and audit legibility

description: Error states must provide descriptive accessible text not just color
check_instruction: Confirm error messages are read by VoiceOver and include corrective guidance

description: Prefer native iOS controls over custom re-implementations
check_instruction: Identify any custom date pickers toggles or pickers — evaluate replacement

description: Use UINavigationController tab bar and sheet patterns as specified by HIG
check_instruction: Confirm navigation follows standard push/pop tab and modal patterns

description: List rows should support swipe-to-delete or swipe actions when appropriate
check_instruction: Verify list items that support deletion have trailing swipe action

description: All content must respect device safe area insets
check_instruction: Check top bottom and side insets — no content hidden behind notch or home indicator

description: iPad layout must use sidebar or split view at regular width
check_instruction: On iPad verify app shows sidebar or multi-column layout not stretched iPhone layout

description: Backgrounds must use systemBackground not #FFFFFF hardcoded
check_instruction: Search for hardcoded white backgrounds and replace with semantic tokens

description: Images and icons must have dark-mode variants or use SF Symbols
check_instruction: Check asset catalog for dark mode variants on all color-sensitive images

description: Text contrast must meet 4.5:1 in both light and dark modes
check_instruction: Run contrast audit in dark mode across all text and background combinations

description: Use SF Symbols for system iconography — match weight to adjacent text
check_instruction: Verify all system-concept icons use SF Symbols at matching weight

description: Navigation bar icons 24pt toolbar icons 22pt tab bar icons 25pt
check_instruction: Measure icon sizes in each context and flag mismatches

description: Section padding minimum 100px vertical
check_instruction: Check that main page sections have at least 100px (preferably 120px) top and bottom padding

description: Content max-width 980px for text
check_instruction: Check that text content blocks are constrained to max-width 980px for readability

description: Card grid max-width 1200px
check_instruction: Check that card grids and visual content are constrained to max-width 1200px

description: All sections use scroll-triggered stagger reveal
check_instruction: Check that content sections fade in when scrolled into view with staggered timing

description: Hero uses staggered entrance animation
check_instruction: Check that hero elements animate in sequence on page load with increasing delays

description: Product visuals use parallax scrolling
check_instruction: Check that hero/product mockups have subtle parallax depth effect

description: Uses Apple standard easing curve
check_instruction: Check that all transitions use cubic-bezier(0.25 0.1 0.25 1) not ease-in-out or linear

description: Only GPU-accelerated properties animated
check_instruction: Check that animations only use transform and opacity not width/height/margin
